'''Vladet''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. It was the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] capital of [[Rachuk sector/Legends|Rachuk sector]]. An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base was located on [[Grand Isle]]. Without vaccination, any visitor to the planet would catch [[Rachuk roseola]]. When [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] attacked the planet, Imperial Admiral [[Devlia]] was killed.

{{Planet-stub}}
